ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist primarily performs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the artist who performs the track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Name of the album the track belongs to */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in seconds */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the track on the streaming platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track being streamed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the region where the streams were recorded */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the streaming chart */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Total number of streams for the track */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the streaming data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the streaming record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the streaming record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track being engaged with */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the region where the engagement occurred */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the track */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes for the track */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the track */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the marketing campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketing campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketing campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_tracks" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marketing campaign */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the track associated with the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign-track association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign-track association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "track_id")
)
